# scriptlevel

> An AI filmmaking tool from words to final cut. Five modes. One project. A browser-based suite from Made by Wind that unifies screenplay, storyboard, voice, timeline, and render into a single project tree, so a short film is carried as one object instead of a file handed between tools.

scriptlevel is built for directors and small teams making short-form video — explainers, ads, music videos, short films, documentaries under five minutes — who have been juggling four tools and losing a shot's worth of context at every handoff.

## The five modes

Each mode is a lens on the same project tree, not a separate document or app.

- **develop** — screenplay editor with shot division. Produces scenes and shots.
- **visualize** — storyboard and style lab. Generates frame variants, locks a look, uses a seed for consistency.
- **perform** — voice cards with takes. Six voices, six waveforms. Pick, blend, or record.
- **assemble** — timeline and program monitor. Tracks, playhead, scrubber.
- **deliver** — render queue and exports gallery. Comment-able review links.

## Status (v0.1)

Free through v0.1. Paid plans when the remaining modes ship.

- Shipped: home dashboard, multi-workspace, project grid, develop mode (screenplay editor + shot division).
- Designed and porting: visualize, perform, assemble, deliver.
- Forthcoming: AI generation wiring to models, accounts, cloud sync, collaboration.

## Production discipline

Generation tools give you clips. scriptlevel gives you a project — with the discipline that short-form production actually runs on:

- Screenplay format as a first-class document, not a workaround.
- Shot codes, lenses, durations, statuses — the metadata of real production.
- Versions on every shot, every frame, every take.
- Render queue with explicit progress and retry.
- Review with comment-able links and time-pinned threads.
- Model-agnostic routing, per shot (forthcoming).

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.scriptlevel.com/): Hero, problem framing, one-shot narrative, five-modes bento, project tree, production discipline, who it's for, FAQ, final CTA.
- [Updates](https://www.scriptlevel.com/updates): Honest ship-state list with per-item status.

- Publisher: Made by Wind (https://madebywind.com)
- Studio behind: candidrender (AI architectural visualization)
- Also from MBW: object guide, shape draft, album os
- Social: @MadebyWind on X, Instagram, Threads, LinkedIn
